title: Lightning Arrester File Search
tagline: Lightning Arrester file retrieval tool — instant specification file delivery from network drive using parameter-based search.
description: JVS Lightning Arrester File Search is an internal LAN-based file retrieval tool built for JVS Switchgears engineering team. It searches company network drive folders using technical parameters — voltage rating, discharge current, arrester class, housing type, and customer — and delivers matching specification files to a secure session folder within seconds. Files auto-delete after 15 minutes. The tool runs entirely on the company's local network with zero cloud dependency, zero subscription cost, and supports multiple simultaneous users without conflicts.

screenshots.caption: Parameter-based search interface showing Customer, Rating, Housing and other dropdowns with live keyword preview
Search results with session folder delivery, copy path button and 15-minute auto-delete countdown

highlights: Parameter-based file search across customer folders on company network drive
Session-based file delivery with auto-cleanup after 15 minutes — no manual deletion needed
Supports digital and scanned PDFs — no manual folder browsing required
Multi-user support — each session is isolated with a unique timestamped folder
100% local — no internet, no cloud, no data leaves the building

items: Customer folder names and network drive paths
File naming conventions and internal document structure
n8n workflow configurations and webhook endpoints
Server IP addresses and LAN architecture details
restricted.label: Internal network details, folder structure, and deployment configuration available on request
